common.cta_ecosystem: I'm a science park / cluster / association

landing.hero_subtitle: Upload your deck. Get expert feedback. Enter the national ranking.
landing.step1_desc: Register your startup in 2 minutes. Upload your pitch deck as PDF and tell us the basics.
landing.step2_desc: Our evaluator analyses your deck across 7 dimensions and gives you actionable feedback based on evidence from your own text.
landing.step3_desc: We assign you a Division (Ideation, Seed, Growth or Elite) and a Vertical. You compete in the national ranking.
landing.for_ecosystem_desc: Science parks, clusters and associations: discover the best startups in your vertical.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.subtitle: National ranking of Spanish startups · La Liga Qanvit
leaderboard.empty: { the league is just starting } · Be the first in your vertical.

play.title: Register your startup
play.subtitle: Upload your startup deck and get automated expert feedback.
play.basics_subtitle: Tell us the basics. You can edit this later.
play.one_liner_placeholder: We automate industrial inspection using computer vision.
play.deck_subtitle: PDF, max 20 MB. Make sure the PDF has selectable text.
play.consent_eval_label: I agree my deck will be evaluated by AI
play.consent_eval_desc: Qanvit will process the text to generate feedback. Deck content is never visible to third parties.
play.consent_public_label: My name, score and Division may appear in the public leaderboard.
play.consent_internal_label: Qanvit may use anonymised feedback to improve the evaluator.
play.evaluating_subtitle: About 40 seconds. Don't close this page.
play.error_no_consent: You must agree for your deck to be evaluated to continue.
play.magic_link_sent: If an account with that email exists, we sent you a sign-in link. Check spam too.

dashboard.title: My dashboard
dashboard.no_evaluation: You don't have any evaluations yet.

ecosystem.apply_subtitle: For science parks, clusters, accelerators and associations.

cookie_banner.message: We use technical (necessary) and analytics (opt-in) cookies. You can customise your choice.
cookie_banner.analytics_desc: Help us understand how the platform is used so we can improve it.

errors.not_found_desc: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
errors.generic_desc: We've been notified. Please try again in a few minutes.

como_funciona.title: How La Liga Qanvit works
como_funciona.subtitle: From deck to national ranking in under 60 seconds.

login.title: Sign in to La Liga
login.subtitle: We send you a magic link. No passwords.
login.check_email_body: We sent a link to {email}. The link expires in 1 hour.
login.check_email_note: If an account with that email exists, we sent you a sign-in link. Check spam too.
login.rate_limited: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
login.error_generic: Failed to send the link. Please try again.
login.error_link_expired: The sign-in link is invalid or has expired. Please try again.

consent.title: Before you enter
consent.description: To use La Liga Qanvit you need to accept how we handle your data. We process your deck with AI to generate feedback. Your deck is never visible to third parties.
consent.checkbox_label: I have read and accept the privacy policy and terms of service.
consent.error: Failed to save consent. Please try again.

ecosystem_landing.hero_subtitle: Science parks, clusters and associations: access Spain's best deep-tech startups and climb the rankings by contributing to the ecosystem.
ecosystem_landing.card1_body: Apply for access and we approve it in 24-48 h. You get a unique referral code and access to your dashboard. You start as Rookie and move up each tier as you contribute.
ecosystem_landing.card2_body: Three tiers: 🥉 Rookie, 🥈 Pro and 🥇 Elite. Each tier unlocks more filters, more evaluator data and exclusive vertical reports.
ecosystem_landing.card3_body: Vote the startups you think will rise. La Liga tracks your Scouting Eye — how many of your bets land right. Top scouts unlock exclusive data.

hub.subtitle: Your area in La Liga Qanvit
hub.newcomer_startup_copy: Upload your deck and get a position in the national league.
hub.newcomer_org_title: I am a park, cluster or association
hub.newcomer_org_copy: Discover startups in your ecosystem with gamified access.
hub.org_pending_copy: We are reviewing your application. We will email you once it is approved.
hub.also_org: Do you also represent an organization?
hub.also_startup: Do you also want to register a startup?
